metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins by Charbel Wakim

plugins.name: session-continuity
plugins.description: Save a portable, human-readable snapshot of a conversation (/handoff) and pick it back up later (/pickup).

plugins.name: branch-cleanup
plugins.description: Safely delete branches already merged into a base branch (local and remote), protecting long-lived branches and never force-deleting.

plugins.name: memory-gardener
plugins.description: Audit and prune Claude Code's persistent memory (/garden): verify stale claims against the project, catch contradictions and duplicates, fix them through one confirmed docket. Session-start nudge + optional scheduled dry-run audits.

plugins.name: memory-backup
plugins.description: Back up Claude Code's machine-local state (/backup): mirror every per-project memory store, handoff note (live and archived), plan document, and the hand-written global config to a private GitHub repo, one squash-merged PR per run. Repo visibility verified before every push, refused if public; every mirrored file secret-scanned before commit (interactive runs ask, cron redacts and flags loudly), credentials never leave the machine. Diff-aware /backup restore fills empty targets wholesale and asks per conflicting file, from GitHub or from a zip; optional cron, cadence is your call (weekly default). /backup zip <path> exports the same mirror as a portable dated archive with no GitHub required, asking each run whether to secret-scan first.
